name: @agenttrust/trustgate-server
description: AgentTrust TrustGate — Express x402 facilitator reference implementation

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const s=p.resolve('src/idl');const d=p.resolve('dist/idl');if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s))if(f.endsWith('.json'))fs.copyFileSync(p.join(s,f),p.join(d,f));}"
